strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js and React product work (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Direct AI agent development experience: MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Deep testing culture — TDD practitioner, author of test libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), created testing courses and workshops
concerns: No stated experience with Nest.js, the primary backend framework for this role
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly listed; testing expertise is demonstrated largely in the D language ecosystem
Java experience appears dated (robotic arms at Altom, 2016-2018) and no Kotlin exposure for the secondary stack
response.justification: The role's core competencies are TypeScript/Node fullstack delivery, testing rigor, cloud/containerization, database experience, and AI agent development. The candidate exceeds the 6+ year bar with concrete TypeScript/React/MongoDB/AWS CDK work at Optilyz, Kubernetes deployment on GISCollective, and current MCP/agentic tooling at re:cinq — a rare direct match for the AI agent requirement. Testing competency is proven through TDD practice at RIDE and authored test frameworks, though not in Vitest specifically. A BS in Computer Science from MIT satisfies the degree requirement. Gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin) rather than conceptual, and the demonstrated polyglot history (D, C++, Java, Swift) suggests quick ramp-up. No explicit auth/security evidence is the remaining unknown.
